name: seo
description: SEO in a Box. One command, full strategy. Point it at your website — get a 21-check site audit, competitive analysis, and 100+ post ideas across 5-8 pillars with production-ready briefs you can hand to a writer. Rejects keywords that dilute your positioning, scores every idea by distance from revenue, and builds a phased publishing roadmap. Works out of the box; prompts for optional DataForSEO API key for precise keyword metrics.
